stemHtml: You are operating in the Gander Oceanic area and communications were initially established via HF radio. Later you receive a SELCAL alert, but due to atmospheric conditions no contact can be made on HF. What should you do?

options.a: Use VHF to contact Gander Oceanic Control Centre as a response to the SELCAL.
options.b: Use 123.450 MHz to contact Gander Oceanic Control Centre to relay to Gander Radio.
options.c: Use SATVOICE since loss of HF is an emergency.
options.d: Use SATVOICE since SELCAL is only a routine call.
